steps.title: Set up the perimeter equation
steps.content: Let the unknown third side be $x$. The perimeter is the sum of all three sides: $$27 + 27 + x = 94$$.

steps.title: Solve for the third side
steps.content:
Combine like terms on the left: $$54 + x = 94.$$
Subtract 54 from both sides: $$x = 94 - 54 = 40.$$
The answer is 40.
